# Izhar Foster (Pvt) Limited

> Pakistan's largest sandwich panel manufacturer and most experienced cold-chain provider since 1959. Cold-chain division of Izhar Group. We engineer the full temperature spectrum — from −40°C industrial blast freezers to controlled-atmosphere fruit stores at +1°C — for Pakistan's food, pharma, dairy, and agriculture sectors.

## Company

- Founded: 1959 by Engineer Izhar Ahmad Qureshi
- Heritage: 65+ years
- Parent: Izhar Group (6 subsidiary companies)
- Manufacturing: 36-KM Multan Road, Lahore
- Offices: Lahore (head), Karachi
- Service: Pakistan-wide
- Site: https://izharfoster.com/

## Products and the temperature spectrum

- [Cold Stores](https://izharfoster.com/services/cold-stores.html) — chiller (0–10°C), walk-in freezer (−18 to −25°C), blast chiller (+70°C → +3°C in 90 min), blast freezer (−40°C air, −18°C core), ambient and dry storage. Capacity 50–10,000 m³.
- [PIR Sandwich Panels](https://izharfoster.com/services/pir-sandwich-panels.html) — ozone-friendly, 0.028 W/m·K, density 60 kg/m³, fire class B1 (ASTM E84). Cores 50/80/100/125/150 mm (up to 250 mm). Lifespan 50+ years. Manufactured in-house.
- [Refrigeration Systems](https://izharfoster.com/services/refrigeration-systems.html) — Ammonia (NH₃) for industrial loads, Freon (HFC/HCFC) for commercial. Chillers, blast freezers, plate freezers, modular cold rooms.
- [Controlled Atmosphere (CA) Stores](https://izharfoster.com/services/ca-stores.html) — precise O₂, CO₂, N₂, humidity, temperature for apples, dates, kinnow, stone fruit. 4–6× shelf life vs cold storage.
- [Prefabricated Structures](https://izharfoster.com/services/prefabricated-structures.html) — steel-frame, PIR-clad. Warehouses, offices, classrooms, sports halls, labour housing. ~3× faster than masonry.
- [Insulated Doors](https://izharfoster.com/services/insulated-doors.html) — sliding, hinged, high-speed. PIR cores, multi-stage gasket seals, heated frames sub-zero.

## Industries

Pharmaceuticals · Dairy · Meat & Poultry · Fruits & Vegetables · Seafood · Logistics & Distribution · Bakery · Beverage · Retail.
